title: hcreport crd spec schema
description:
this the json schema for the hcreport custom resource definition. 
example using all options:
  loglevel: error
  rebuildAfter: never
  kcdump:
    ttlSecondsAfterFinished: 3600
    memoryLimit: 640Mi
    diskLimit: 3G
    config:
      loglevel: error
      async-workers:
      default-chunk-size:
      xns: 
      - openshift-.*
      - open-cluster.*
      - default
      xgvk: 
      - metrics.*:Pod.*
      - .*:Event.*
      async-chunk-map: 
        events.v1: 100
        events.events.k8s.io/v1: 100
      sync-chunk-map: 
        packagemanifests.packages.operators.coreos.com/v1: 1
        apirequestcounts.apiserver.openshift.io/v1: 1
        customresourcedefinitions.apiextensions.k8s.io/v1: 1
        configmaps.v1: 1
  docbase:
    site_author: Red Hatter

rebuildAfter.description: use the word never or time duration expression (NUMBER[m,s,h]) that will be used to calculate how long to wait before building the report again. all phases will be re-run, collect/dump, dumpdb load and report building

kcdump.description: configure how the dump job will behave and its configuration

ttlSecondsAfterFinished.description: let the finished job live for how long seconds?

memoryLimit.description: limit memory for the dump process

diskLimit.description: emptyDir size where the cluster dump data will be written in the job pod

config.description: part of the kcdump app config as needed for the report custom resource definition

async-workers.description: number of group version kind to process in parallel

default-chunk-size.description: number of list items to retrieve until finished for all async workers

xns.description: regex to match and exclude unwanted namespaces. ex: open-.*
xns.default: empty. all namespaces included in the dump

xgvk.description: regex to match and exclude unwanted groupVersion and kind. format is 'gv:k' where gv is regex to capture gv and k is regex to capture kind. ex: metrics.*:Pod.*
xgvk.default: empty. all groupVersions and its kinds included in the dump

async-chunk-map.description: a map of string to int. 'name.gv' -> 'list chunk size'. for the resources acquired in parallel with the desired chunk size

sync-chunk-map.description: a map of string to int. 'name.gv' -> 'list chunk size'. for the resources acquired one by one with the desired chunk size before anything else

docbase.description: special config for the generated static site and pdf of the report

site_author.description: for the pdf report output cover
